name: EACO CORP
business: EACO Corporation, through its subsidiary Bisco Industries, distributes electronic components and fasteners, including spacers, standoffs, circuit board connectors, and cable components, as well as a variety of fasteners and hardware. The company sells primarily to original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) and also to other distributors. Its customers operate in industries such as aerospace, circuit board, communication, computer, fabrication, instrumentation, industrial equipment, and marine.

exposures.sentence: Bisco supplies parts used in the manufacture of products in a broad range of industries, including the aerospace, circuit board, communication, computer, fabrication, instrumentation, industrial equipment and marine industries.

catalysts.event: Open additional sales office in Chihuahua, Mexico
catalysts.sentence: Bisco also intends to open an additional sales office in Chihuahua, Mexico in December 2025.
